title: Opportunity for a Monday.com Implementation Specialist

posts.author: ElenaK (Elena Korolkova (Kick Consulting))
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone!

I’m the founder of Kick Consulting, a technology integration and process automation consulting group. Due to a rapidly growth, we are looking for an experienced Monday.com freelancer to join our team.

A little bit about us:

We started three years ago as a project management consulting firm offering Monday.com business optimizations and became a Monday.com partner. A year and a half ago, Kick Consulting had a growth spurt, and now we are one of the most Googled Monday.com consultant in Australia.

Our team expanded four times in the last six months, and we’re now looking for a switched on, and tech-savvy individual to join our team as a Monday.com Execution Specialist.

In your role, you will work closely with the project management and dev teams on allocated client projects, implementing Monday.com set up for clients based on the proposal, project plan and feedback from the project manager

If you are interested, please apply via this link.

The team Kick

(www.kickconsulting.com.au)
